titleStmt.title: SII 17.600: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 600. (A.R. No. 555 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the first prākāra in the Tyāgarājasvāmin temple.
The details of date given viz. year 20, Makara śu. 13, Wednesday, Punarpūśam regularly correspond to 1266 A.D., January 20, ·77, ·82.

This inscription records the grant of two pieces of land by Pirambar Viśaiyapālar of Tiruviḍaimarudūr to the maṭha built for the tapasyar, who were tending the gardens of the temple, doing other services in the shrines of gods Aḻagiya Tiruchchiṟṟambalam- uḍaiyār and Poṟpatikku-nāyakīśvaramuḍaiyār, set up by the donor and Aḻagapperumāl alias Kaḷappāḷarāyar of Śiṟunāṅgūr. One of the pieces of the land is stated to have been purchased from Umaiyāḻvi alias Aḻagilumaḻagiyadēvattalaikkōli, one of the dancing girls (padiyilār) living in the northern row of Irāśākkaḷ tambirāṉ-tiruvīdi Sannadhi-ttiruvīdi. The mahāsabhā of Aḍiyakkai-chcharuppēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Tiruvārūr-kkūṟṟam in Gēyamāṇikka-vaḷanāḍu remitted the taxes on the lands.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ tiripuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrīrājendracoḻadevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 vatu makara nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu trayodaśiyum budhaṉ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa puṇarpūcattu nāḷ keyamāṇikka vaḷanāṭṭut tiruvārurk kūṟṟattu brahmadeśam Aṭiyakkaic caruppeti maṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom vyavasthai . celvat tiruvāruril Irācākkaḷ tampirāṉ tiruviti caṉṉatit tiruviti teṉ ciṟakil ciṟunāṅkūruṭaiyār Aḻakap perumāḷāṉa kaḷappāḷarāyarum
pirampar tiruviṭaimarutūruṭaiyārāṉa vicaiyapālarum Eḻuntaruḷivitta Uṭaiyār Aḻakiya tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyārum Uṭaiyār poṟpatikku nāyakiśvara muṭaiyārum koyil pūjai yum celuttit tiruppaṇiyum ceyvittu tirunantavaṉamum ceytu tiruppaḷḷittāmamum paṟittu sevittu Irukkum tapasyarkku Ittiruviti vaṭaciṟakil patiyilāril Umaiyāḻviyāṉa Aḻakilumaḻakiya tevat talaikkoli pakkal Ivarkaḷ vilaikoṇṭu kaṟpitta maṭattukku Iṟaiyiliyākakkuṭu
tta Inta vicaiyapālar muṉṉāḷil Irāyūr Ārā Amutupaṭṭaṉ pakkal vilaikoṇṭa Irācavic cātira vāykkālukkut teṉ pakkattu Āyapperai Oṭaiyeṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattukku kiḻpārkkellai kārampicceṭṭu nampi muttapirāṉ paṭṭaṉ nilattukku meṟkum veṟpuṟattu poṉṉampipaṭṭaṉuḷḷiṭṭār nilattukku vaṭakkum nampūrk kāṭṭukkai cantirapūṣaṇapaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār nilattukkuk kiḻakkum ykkā
lukku teṟkum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam kālekāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻ muṉṟu māvum In nilattuk kiḻaittaṭiyilp potutturavi lopātiyum Uṭpaṭa Immaṭattukku śeṣamāka Ivar kuṭukkaiyil In nilattāl vanta tarappaṭi nellu Aimpattunāṟ kalaṉe Aiṅkuṟuṇi Aiññāḻi yum veṭṭi parivāram Ūrkkaṇakka jīvitam koyiṟṟamappeṟu kuṭimai kārttikaip(p)aiccai Uḷḷiṭṭu mel varuvaṉavum Uṭpaṭa Im maṭattu tapasyarkku Iṟaiyili ṟavum
In nellum kācum Ūrile Oṭṭukku Uṭalāṉa nilattile Eṟṟi Iṟukkavum Iṉṉa mum Immaṭattukku Iṟṟaināḷil nāṅkaḷ Iṟaiyiliyāka vyavasthai paṇṇikkuṭutta Ivūr kiḻpakkattu tiruvāl Eṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattukkuk kiḻpārkkellai Uṭaiyār tiruvāru ruṭaiyār Eṇṇai nilattukku meṟkum brahmasthāṉa nilattukku vaṭakku tirukkaṭavūr Aruḷāḷapaṭṭaṉ nilattukkuk kiḻakkum Uṭaiyār tiruvāruruṭaiyār Eṇṇai nilattukkut teṟkum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam � kiḻakkuva3patma Innilam nālumā varaikkāṇik kiḻ Eṭṭumā muk kāṇikku tarappaṭi nellu patiṉaṟu kalaṉetūṇi Ai
ññāḻi Uḻakkum veṭṭi parivāram Ūrkkaṇakkajjivitam koyiṟṟamappeṟu kuṭimai kārttikaip(p)aiccai Uḷḷiṭṭu mel varuvaṉavum Uṭpaṭa nāme Iṟukkavum Innilat tukku Uṭalāka nammuril niṅkalāṉa kuḷaṅkaḷil nampikuḷam Ūraiviṭṭu viṉiyokattukku Uṭallilāmaiyil Ittapasyarkku nām Iṟaiyiliyākak kuṭutta nilam nālumāvaraik kāṇik kiḻ Eṭṭumā mukkāṇikku veṇṭum nilam tiruttip payirc ceytu Innellukku Okkat taram Iṭṭukkoḷḷakkaṭavo mākavum Innilam Ittapasyar Iṟaiyiliyāka canti rātittavaṟ Aṉupavikkak kaṭavarkaḷākavum vyava
sthai paṇṇiṉom mahāsabhaiyom paṇiyāl Ūrkkaṇakku kaṇṇamaṅkala muṭaiyāṉ nampiyāḻvāṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai kārampicceṭṭu Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷa paṭṭaṉum nārā yaṇapaṭṭaṉum periyanampipaṭṭaṉum ciriḷaṅkopaṭṭaṉum Iḷaiyāḻvāṉ paṭṭaṉum komaṭattu tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉum toraṇacūrapaṭṭaṉum tiruvikkirama paṭṭaṉum nārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉum nāraciṅkapaṭṭaṉum viṣṇupaṭṭaṉum ciṅkappirāṉ paṭṭaṉum śrīkṛṣṇa paṭṭaṉum śrīrāma paṭṭaṉum nampūrkkāṭṭukkaic ciriḷaṅko paṭṭaṉum cantirapūṣaṇapaṭṭaṉum tiruvaraṅkamāḷi paṭṭaṉum dakṣaṇā
murtti paṭṭaṉum kovinta paṭṭaṉum śrīkṛṣṇapaṭṭaṉum tiruveṅkaṭa paṭṭaṉum tiveti komapurattu Iruṣīkecuva paṭṭaṉum nārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉum mahadeva paṭṭaṉum ciṅkap pirāṉ paṭṭaṉum mahācurai tiyākaviṉota paṭṭaṉum Utaiyadivākaraṉ centapirāṉ paṭṭaṉum bhrāntūr kecava paṭṭaṉum Irāyūr Ārāamutu paṭṭaṉum śrīviṣṇupaṭṭaṉum cirāma paṭṭaṉum kā Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷa paṭṭaṉum Eḻutteṉṟum Iṭṭatu: U
Digital edition of SII 17.600 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
